title: Stamps
description: The Stamp!  Quick and Easy copy/pasting of signs!
body:
# Stamps!
This mod adds one item, the Stamp!

### What is the Stamp???
The stamp item is able to copy data from signs, and paste it onto other signs!

### Why is the Stamp?!  
For players that use repetitive signs as parts of their build, it can be tedious to copy and paste each line in.  This reduces the time dramatically, while also being vanilla friendly

### How is the Stamp?  
Shift clicking with an empty Stamp onto a sign with text will copy the text to the stamp  
Shift clicking with a Stamp with data onto a sign with no text will paste the text, and consume the dye needed from the players inventory automatically.  
Signs with text already can not be overwritten.
Clicking on a water cauldron with a stamp will "wash" it off, and reset the data

### How Craft The Stamp?

![stamp recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afdff1284a0a30e7296b8fa58de4fd34904c65.png)
